methodology.description: BTTS probability calculated using xG-based Poisson model + 3 supporting models

models.name: xG Poisson (Primary)
models.description: Expected Goals model - removes luck variance, measures shot quality

models.name: Historical BTTS Rates
models.description: Team-specific BTTS rates with home/away venue splits

models.name: Scoring Patterns
models.description: Failed-to-score and clean sheet rates adjusted for opponent

models.name: Recent Form
models.description: Exponentially weighted last 5 games (reduced weight - noisy signal)
